description: The GaussianSplatTool component can be applied to a slot to create a Gaussian Splat Tool, used to manipulate a Gaussian Splat in 3D space.

fields.Mode: The selected mode for this Gaussian Splat Tool.
fields.BoxSelectionTemplate: The templete used to show the user what is being cropped when using the box.
fields.SphereSelectionTemplate: The templete used to show the user what is being cropped when using the sphere.
fields.CylinderSelectionTemplate: The templete used to show the user what is being cropped when using the cylinder.
